# Mario Marcolongo

> Independent researcher, web engineer, and open science builder. Based in Italy, open to relocation.

## Quick Facts
- 4,317 verified Wikimedia Foundation contributions (Wikipedia, Wikidata, Commons)
- Founded Yourself to Science™ (yourselftoscience.org) — open biobanking directory
- Sole web developer for Entropy for Life (entropyforlife.it) — 245K+ subscribers
- Built MDPI Citation Filter (Chrome & Edge extension)
- 41× WGS genomic pipeline (Nextflow, pgsc_calc, ClinVar)

## Links
- Website: https://mariomarcolongo.com
- Full profile: https://mariomarcolongo.com/llms-full.txt
- Email: me@mariomarcolongo.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/mario-marcolongo
- ORCID: https://orcid.org/0000-0003-2846-7115
